source_context.script_excerpt: He stands at the edge of the cliff, staring into the horizon, carrying everything he lost in silence.
source_context.source_image_prompt: Cinematic wide shot of a lone traveler standing still on a windy ocean cliff at sunset, seen from behind, facing the horizon, dramatic clouds, soft golden-hour light, melancholic atmosphere.

scene_analysis.main_subject: a lone traveler on the cliff
scene_analysis.subject_action: standing still and absorbing the horizon
scene_analysis.environment: windy ocean cliff at golden hour

camera_movement.purpose: deepen emotional intimacy without breaking the wide composition

subject_motion.details: gentle coat movement in the wind and a slight natural posture shift

environment_motion.details: slow cloud drift, faint ocean motion and soft ambient wind behavior

preserve: the sunset mood and horizon readability

final_video_prompt: A cinematic wide shot of a lone traveler standing on a windy ocean cliff at sunset, facing the horizon. The camera performs a very slow dolly forward, deepening emotional intimacy while preserving the original wide composition. The traveler remains mostly still, with only subtle coat movement and a slight posture shift from the wind. Clouds drift slowly, the ocean moves gently below, and the overall motion remains restrained, melancholic and cinematic.
negative_prompt: avoid fast movement, avoid chaotic reframing, avoid exaggerated body motion, avoid geometry distortion
